title: AELFMC
description: Displays the day's liturgical information in MOTD.
body:
AELF MC displays the liturgical information of the day directly in your Minecraft server's Message Of The Day (MOTD).

How it works

    The mod fetches the daily liturgical calendar from the AELF API.

    The first line of the MOTD is the one set in your server.properties file.

    The second line shows the current liturgical day, displayed in the appropriate liturgical color.

Example
If your server.properties MOTD is:
Sanctus Marcus
and the liturgical day on 2024-08-10 is "Saint Laurent, diacre et martyr" (red liturgical color), the MOTD will appear as:

![AELF-MOTD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac19ff76cf1fbbc5b60ca0c1f8a4a311393e9043.png)

Features

    Automatically updates daily with correct liturgical information.

    Supports all colors of the Roman Catholic liturgical calendar.

    No configuration required after setup.

No user data is collected.
Open-source and free to use.
